description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy that triggers on push events with tags matching 'v*'. Run a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, sets up .NET Core 3.1.301, restores dependencies, builds and tests Impostor.Client and Impostor.Server, publishes and zips the server for win-x64 and linux-x64, creates a draft release, and uploads the zipped assets to the release.
